name: AI Smart Galaxy - AI resume screening

path: AI Smart Galaxy Applicant Rejected or Interview List Screen Resumes Using AI

parameters.name: handleErrors
parameters.label: Evaluate all states as errors (except for 2xx and 3xx )

expect.name: shareCookies
expect.label: Share cookies with other HTTP modules

convertType.label: PDF to Text (simple, no layout, fast)

messages.content:
You're a recruitment manager. Your task is to review the following resume for the {{1.`5`}} position. Please use the following criteria:
Rate from 0 to 100%. There is a maximum of 100 points that someone can get, assuming that they have a perfect resume and no points are deducted based on red flags.

1. Experience in Role (40 points)
If the candidate has more than 3 years of experience in a {{1.`5`}} position, award 20 points.

2. Degree in Relevant Field (10 points)
If the candidate has a degree in {{1.`5`}} or a related field, award 10 points.

3. Spelling and Grammar (15 points deduction)
If the candidate has more than 5 spelling and grammar issues in their CV, deduct 15 points.

4. Reputable University (5 points)
If the candidate has graduated from a reputable university, award 5 points.

5. Sales Experience (40 points)
If the candidate has experience in cold calling, inbound calling, or prospecting award 20 points.

6. Unemployment Gap (30 points deduction)
If the candidate hasn't had a job in 1 year or more, deduct 30 points. If the candidate has a gap of 3 years, also deduct 30 points.

7. Job Longevity (30 points deduction)
If the average length the candidate has held jobs is less than 1.5 years, deduct 30 points.

8. Keyword Frequency (5 points)
If the candidate mentions the word {{1.`5`}}, or similar keywords 5 or more times, award 5 points.

mapper.subject: Thanks for applying
mapper.text:
Hey {{1.`1`}},

It's Jono from XYZ company. Thanks for applying. Unfortunately, we decided to go in another direction.

Best,
Jono

messages.message: Connection: Value must not be empty.

mapper.subject: Congratulations, we want to interview you!
mapper.text:
Hey {{1.`1`}},

It's Jono from XYZ company. Thanks for applying.

Congratulations, I'd like to schedule an interview with you for our sales position. You can choose a time on my calendar here:
https://calendly.com/appointment

Best,
Jono

messages.message: Connection: Value must not be empty.
